title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSDL - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSDL - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at NSDL are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSDL:
NSDL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL!
